subject: USB Repair Agent Project — Full Handoff
message:
Here is the complete handoff for the USB stick repair agent project. Jay wants us to finish this together.

PROJECT: Liberty Agent for Puppy Linux — a bootable USB repair toolkit with AI.

WHAT IT IS:
A USB drive that boots into Puppy Linux with a pre-configured Hermes AI agent. Repair tech plugs it into any computer, boots from USB, and controls the AI via Telegram from their phone. The AI helps diagnose and fix the customer's computer.

TARGET OS/DISTRO:
Puppy Linux — specifically FossaPup64 9.5 (based on Ubuntu 20.04, ~350MB ISO, Python 3.8+ pre-installed, apt package manager, good hardware support).

BOOT METHOD:
Ventoy on the USB drive. Ventoy is installed on the USB once, then you just copy the Puppy ISO + liberty-agent-puppy folder to the USB. Boot menu lets you select Puppy Linux.

AGENT FRAMEWORK:
Custom Python agent (liberty-agent.py) running inside Puppy Linux. Communicates via Telegram bot. Uses OpenRouter for AI (Claude, GPT-4, etc.). Not the full Hermes framework — a lightweight custom agent built for this specific use case.

REPAIR TOOLS INCLUDED:
- Disk cleanup (temp files, large files, old logs)
- Virus scanning (ClamAV)
- File recovery (PhotoRec/TestDisk)
- Disk health diagnostics (SMART)
- Windows boot repair (diagnose and fix)
- System inventory (hardware/software info)
- Drive mounting (NTFS/FAT/ext)
- AI-powered diagnostics and advice via Telegram

TELEGRAM BOT COMMANDS:
/start, /status, /drives, /cleanup, /scan, /health, /mount, /recover, /ask, plus any text message gets an AI response.

CURRENT BUILD STATE:
Version 1.0.0 — code is COMPLETE and ready. Files are at liberty-agent-puppy/ (132KB total). The project includes:
- scripts/bootstrap.sh — first-run installer
- scripts/liberty-agent.py — main agent
- tools/repair-tools.sh — standalone repair scripts
- config/ — env template, agent memory files, owl avatars
- docs/BUILD.md — build docs
- README.md — user docs

The code EXISTS. It's written. It needs to be:
1. Copied onto a Ventoy USB with the Puppy ISO
2. Tested on a real machine
3. Packaged for distribution

ROADBLOCKS:
- Has NOT been tested on actual customer hardware yet
- Bootstrap script needs testing in live Puppy environment
- The pre-built ISO idea (baking everything into the ISO so no bootstrap is needed) is listed as a future improvement but not yet done
- No Windows PE ISO on the same USB yet (also future improvement)

FUTURE IMPROVEMENTS LISTED:
- Pre-built Puppy ISO with everything baked in
- Auto-detect Windows partitions and offer repair
- Screenshots via Telegram
- Remote file browser
- Automated repair report PDF
- Windows PE ISO on same USB
- Customer data wipe tool
- Network scanner

SOURCE LOCATION: /home/lol/Desktop/openclaw/liberty-agent-puppy/

Please review and let me know where you want to pick this up. Jay wants us working on this together.
